companies.name: Easy Eye Sound Studios, Nashville, TN
Easy Eye Sound Studios, Nashville, TN

title: Ultraviolence
notes:
180 gram black vinyl. Gatefold sleeve. Includes download voucher.

℗ 2014 Lana Del Rey, under exclusive license to Polydor Ltd. (UK). Under exclusive license to Interscope Records in the USA. © 2014 Lana Del Rey, under exclusive license to Polydor Ltd. (UK). Under exclusive license to Interscope Records in the USA. The copyright in this sound recording is owned by Lana Del Rey, under exclusive license to Polydor Ltd. (UK). Under exclusive license to Interscope Records in the USA.

"Cruel World" published by Copyright Control/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mixed at Hot Rocks Studios. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London. Recorded at Easy Eye Sound, Nashville, TN. USA.

"Ultraviolence" published by Songs Publishing/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London. Recorded & mixed at Easy Eye Sound, Nashville, TN. USA.

"Shades Of Cool" published by R-Rated Music administered by EMI April Music Inc. (ASCAP)/Sony ATV Music Publishing Ltd. Mixed at Hot Rocks Studios. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London. Recorded at Easy Eye Sound, Nashville, TN. USA.

"Brooklyn Baby" published by Copyright Control/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mixed at Hot Rocks Studios. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London. Recorded at Easy Eye Sound, Nashville, TN. USA.

"West Coast" published by R-Rated Music administered by EMI April Music Inc. (ASCAP)/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mastered at Gateway Mastering Studios, Portland, Maine.

"Sad Girl" published by R-Rated Music administered by EMI April Music Inc. (ASCAP)/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mixed at Hot Rocks Studios. Vocals recorded at The Green Building (Santa Monica). Recorded at Easy Eye Sound, Nashville, TN. USA.

"Pretty When You Cry" published by Copyright Control/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mixed at Hot Rocks Studios. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London. Recorded at Electric Lady Studios NYC.

"Money Power Glory" published by Kurstin Music/EMI April Music, Inc. (ASCAP)/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London. Recorded at Echo Studio, Los Angeles, CA. USA.

"Fucked My Way Up To The Top" published by Songs Publishing/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mixed at Hot Rocks Studios. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London. Recorded at Easy Eye Sound, Nashville, TN. USA.

"Old Money" published by Songs Publishing/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mixed at Hot Rocks Studios. Strings recorded at The Bridge, Glendale, LA. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London.

"The Other Woman" published by Edward Kassner Music Co. Ltd. Mixed at Hot Rocks Studios.

"Black Beauty" published by R-Rated Music administered by EMI April Music Inc. (ASCAP)/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London. Recorded at The Church Studios, London, UK and The Green Building, Santa Monica, USA.

"Guns And Roses" published by R-Rated Music administered by EMI April Music Inc. (ASCAP)/Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London. Recorded and mixed at Electric Lady Studios NYC, USA.

"Florida Kilos" published by Copyright Control/Hour Box Music (BMI), administered by Wixen Music Publishing, Inc./Sony/ATV Music Publishing. Mastered at Metropolis Studios, London. Recorded at Easy Eye Sound, Nashville, TN. USA.

Catalog numbers/identifiers  -

coarse language
and/or themes
UNIVERSAL
